description: Create smmway_v1.3.12.py from the existing file, fix the order processing bug, remove #smmway from descriptions, fix auto-pricing, and add chat commands !статус !рефилл !отмена
steps: 1. Copy 'smmway_v1.3.11 (2).py' to 'smmway_v1.3.12.py' and update VERSION to '1.3.12'.

2. FIX ORDER PROCESSING BUG in on_new_order (line ~1132): The handler accesses order.chat_id which may not exist on FPC's NewOrderEvent.order object. Add safe attribute access with fallback: use getattr(order, 'chat_id', None) or getattr(order, 'buyer_id', None) or getattr(order, 'buyer_node_id', None). Similarly for buyer_username and buyer_id - use getattr with fallbacks. Wrap the critical section so AttributeError doesn't silently skip orders.

3. FIX find_lot_by_title (line ~605): The current matching only checks if stored title is IN description. Add reverse check: also match if description is IN stored title. Add a third fallback: match by funpay_lot_id if order has offer_id or lot_id attribute. This ensures lot matching works even when FPC truncates titles.
4. REMOVE '#smmway' from DEFAULT_LOT_TEMPLATE_RU and DEFAULT_LOT_TEMPLATE_EN description templates (line ~423-441). Remove the '#smmway' line from both templates.

5. FIX AUTO-PRICING in compute_fp_price (line ~1054): The formula per_unit_rub * (1.0 + markup_pct / 100.0) * rate is correct for the business logic. BUT ensure min_price works as a proper floor: set DEFAULT_CONFIG min_lot_price to 1.0 (1 ruble minimum, which is the FunPay minimum). This ensures that when computed price is too small, the minimum allowed price is used instead.
6. ENSURE ПОТЕРЯШКА (_replace_lot_inplace at line ~1651) uses the same compute_fp_price with the same min_price logic. It already does, so just verify min_price is propagated from config properly.
7. ADD CHAT COMMANDS to on_new_message handler: detect !статус, !рефилл, !отмена (with ! prefix). Route to new handler functions.

8. IMPLEMENT !статус command handler (_handle_status_command): Find the latest order for the buyer. Call CTX.api.order_status(smm_order_id) to get fresh data. Show detailed stats: order ID, status, start_count, remains, charge, estimated time remaining (estimate based on progress rate). Format as a clear multi-line message.

9. IMPLEMENT !рефилл command handler (_handle_refill_command): Find the latest completed order for the buyer. Check if the service supports refill (service.get('refill') is truthy). If not supported, reply with error. If supported, call CTX.api.refill(smm_order_id). Notify buyer of success/failure.

10. IMPLEMENT !отмена command handler (_handle_cancel_command): Find the latest active (non-completed) order for the buyer. If order status is 'completed', reply that completed orders cannot be cancelled. Otherwise call CTX.api.cancel(smm_order_id). Check if cancellation was successful and if money was refunded. Only if the API confirms refund, initiate FunPay refund. Notify buyer of result.
11. UPDATE lot description templates to mention the new commands. Add to both RU and EN templates a section listing available commands: !статус, !рефилл, !отмена with brief descriptions.
12. UPDATE the render_lot function's 'commands' variable to include the three new commands in the rendered text instead of just 'Отправьте ссылку - заказ запустится автоматически'.
acceptance_criteria: File smmway_v1.3.12.py exists and passes Python syntax validation (py_compile)
on_new_order uses safe getattr() for order.chat_id, order.buyer_id, order.buyer_username with fallbacks
find_lot_by_title does bidirectional substring matching (title in desc AND desc in title)
#smmway removed from both RU and EN description templates
DEFAULT_CONFIG min_lot_price is set to 1.0 (minimum 1 ruble)
!статус shows detailed order info including remains, start_count, charge, estimated time
!отмена refuses to cancel completed orders and only refunds if API confirms
Lot description templates include command documentation for buyers
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/smmway && python3 -c "import py_compile; py_compile.compile('smmway_v1.3.12.py', doraise=True)" - must pass

Run: cd /projects/sandbox/smmway && python3 -c "import ast; tree = ast.parse(open('smmway_v1.3.12.py').read()); funcs = [n.name for n in ast.walk(tree) if isinstance(n, ast.FunctionDef)]; assert '_handle_refill_command' in funcs; assert '_handle_cancel_command' in funcs; print('All new functions found')"

Run: cd /projects/sandbox/smmway && python3 -c "content = open('smmway_v1.3.12.py').read(); assert '#smmway' not in content; assert 'VERSION = \"1.3.12\"' in content; assert '!статус' in content; assert '!рефилл' in content; assert '!отмена' in content; assert 'min_lot_price' in content; print('All checks passed')"
